title: Amendment Scope-Overlap Check — promote RULE-PIPELINE-AMENDMENT-SUBSTRATE-RECHECK-1 to automated
description: Authors .github/workflows/amendment-scope-overlap-check.yml — GHA workflow that on PRs touching schemas/_instances/deliverables/*.json computes scopeFiles intersection between the modified deliverable instance and all other in-flight deliverable instances (lifecycleState in S5-in-progress or S6-staged). Fails check on non-empty intersection unless modified instance's notes field declares resolution sequencing. Promotes RULE-PIPELINE-AMENDMENT-SUBSTRATE-RECHECK-1 from activeTier human-loop to activeTier automated. Approach (a): schema-registry CI workflow per Erik direction 2026-06-01. Self-contained. Opens the pipeline-discipline axis (distinct from CI-gating axis closed by FU-D-2 + FU-D-3). Closes FU-RULE-AMENDMENT-RECHECK-AUTOMATED-SURFACE-1.

outputs.description: .github/workflows/amendment-scope-overlap-check.yml — GHA workflow computing scopeFiles intersection across in-flight deliverables.
acceptanceCriteria: Triggers on PR events touching schemas/_instances/deliverables/*.json
Identifies modified deliverable instance files on the PR
Reads in-flight deliverables (lifecycleState in S5-in-progress, S6-staged)
Fails check on non-empty intersection unless notes field declares resolution sequencing
Passes when no overlap or only one in-flight
Workflow passes on this PR (self-test: 1 pre-existing in-flight, no scopeFile overlap)

outputs.description: RULE-PIPELINE-AMENDMENT-SUBSTRATE-RECHECK-1 promoted via canonical mechanism: version 1.0.0 → 1.1.0; tierState.activeTier human-loop → automated; transition appended with evidenceClass citing the workflow.
acceptanceCriteria: New transition: from human-loop, to automated, evidenceClass populated

outputs.description: Prospective deliverable spec — S4 → S5 → S6 across dispatch; S7/S8 post-merge amendment.

transitions.trigger: Dispatch authored after FU-D-3 close (5a01c56). Third rule promotion. Approach (a): schema-registry CI workflow per Erik direction 2026-06-01. Substrate verification: 1 in-flight (deck-sweep), no overlap with FU-D-4 scope.
PROCEED STEP 2 issued; substrate logic verification passed; workflow + rule promotion authored
Workflow YAML valid, rule promoted via canonical mechanism, all validations clean; preparing PR

notes: Third rule promotion in the foundation arc's FU block. Opens pipeline-discipline axis (CI-gating axis was closed by FU-D-2 + FU-D-3 pair). Approach (a) per Erik direction: schema-registry CI workflow. Approach (b) eb-agent MCP dependency-report tool was the alternative; deferred. Workflow design: read modified deliverable instance scopeFiles, compute intersection with other in-flight deliverables' scopeFiles (S5-in-progress or S6-staged), fail check on non-empty intersection without resolution-sequencing declaration. Resolution keyword: 'resolution sequencing' or 'scope-overlap acknowledged' in modified instance notes. Self-tests on this PR: deck-sweep (only in-flight) has scopeFiles=['schemas/_instances/deliverables/d-2026-06-01-deck-sweep-sequencing.json'] — zero intersection with FU-D-4 scope.
